description: Memorial list mentioning names, among others, of Yehoshuaʿ the haver and Dosa the haver and Netanʾel 'the Sixth' (probably b. Moshe ha-Levi). In the margin refers to Yehoshuaʿ ha-Sar ha-Gadol. (Information in part from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
